# Issue Title

Improve Tailwind preset documentation

## Description

The repository includes Tailwind presets for each skill. Add clearer documentation showing how to use them in common frontend projects.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Add examples for importing a skill preset.
- [ ] Explain when to use CSS directly versus the Tailwind preset.
- [ ] Document expected `content` configuration.
- [ ] Link examples from the root README or skill READMEs.

## Suggested Labels

`documentation`, `developer-experience`, `tailwind`
